stemHtml: One of your passengers reports feeling a sharp pain in his chest and left arm that subsides after a few minutes. Which of the following is the most probable reason?

options.a: Angina pectoris caused by a total blockage of the coronary artery, which may result in an irreversible condition.
options.b: Angina pectoris caused by a partial blockage of the coronary artery, which typically does not lead to tissue death.
options.c: Heart stroke caused by a total blockage of the coronary artery, leading to tissue death.
options.d: Heart stroke caused by a partial blockage of the coronary artery, which may still lead to tissue death.
